creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sunpoet     2012-02-29 16:05:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Getopt-Compact-WithCmd Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                    pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Add p5-Getopt-Compact-WithCmd 0.19
  
  Getopt::Compact::WithCmd is yet another Getopt::* module. It allows you to
  define git-like options. In addition, usage can be set at the same time.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Getopt-Compact-WithCmd/
  
  PR:             ports/165498
  Submitted by:   Kan Sasaki <sasaki@fcc.ad.jp>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4878    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/devel/p5-Getopt-Compact-WithCmd/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/p5-Getopt-Compact-WithCmd/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/p5-Getopt-Compact-WithCmd/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/p5-Getopt-Compact-WithCmd/pkg-plist (new)
